arts.ttl: Fabregas also touted as candidate for Leipzig job
arts.sum: Cesc Fabregas is the latest name to be mentioned in connection with the RB Leipzig coaching job.

arts.ttl: Ezechiel Banzuzi: Who is RB Leipzig's new Dutch midfielder?
arts.sum: RB Leipzig have announced the summer arrival of Ezechiel Banzuzi move from Belgian Pro League side Leuven. Impressive performances for club and country convinced Leipzig to make Banzuzi their first signing ahead of the 2025/26 season.

arts.ttl: Preview: Wolfsburg vs. RB Leipzig - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Friday's Bundesliga clash between Wolfsburg and RB Leipzig, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
